visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black apron-style dress, stands in a warehouse aisle. She smiles and holds a large illustrated metal tin. The background features high industrial shelves packed with stacks of the same gift box. Large yellow and white text overlays are visible at the top and bottom. (2) Close-up shot of the woman's hands as she holds and slowly rotates a cylindrical metal tin. The tin has a pink and white lid and intricate illustrations of a garden, a person on a horse, and mushrooms. The woman points with her right index finger at the printed details on the tin surface. (3) The woman is shown in a medium shot again, gesturing with her hands while talking. She holds the tin against her body. In the background, other shoppers with metal carts are briefly visible. (4) Close-up of the tin's lid. It is pink and white with a gold-colored knob in the center. Encircling the knob is the text "HOW TO PLAY". The woman's manicured hand points to the text on the lid. (5) The woman stands in the middle of the aisle, holding the tin and looking directly at the camera. She points to the tin while an off-screen person's hand also points to the product. (6) A static graphic shot replaces the live footage, showing a rectangular box that displays various tubes and jars of lotions and soaps. The brand name "Cath Kidston" is prominently displayed at the top against a pink checkered background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 500元超便宜. [Variety]: 聖誕換禮物神品 身體保養禮盒組. [Subtitle]: 聖誕節不知道送什麼嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: 天吶 這個我想送給我自己. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多聽到你們交換禮物痛苦的聲音了. [Variety]: 交換禮物 痛苦的聲音了. (4) [Subtitle]: Cath Kidston他出的 聖誕之旅身體保養禮盒組. [Variety]: 聖誕之旅 身體保養禮盒組. (5) [Subtitle]: 他竟然是一個鐵盒 我超愛鐵盒 你們看他 這個小花花 超級漂亮. (6) [Subtitle]: 有笑容的小花花. (7) [Subtitle]: Oh my god 他是立體的 浮雕的這種感覺 轉一圈轉一圈. (8) [Subtitle]: 啊 好可愛喔 超夢幻有沒有 你們看. (9) [Subtitle]: 這邊有一隻小狗狗戴聖誕帽. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後情侶在溜冰 好可愛. (11) [Subtitle]: 看這個盒子 很適合收納東西哎. (12) [Subtitle]: 我看旁邊有被人家打開 我們看一下他的蓋子頭. (13) [Subtitle]: 也很漂亮. (14) [Subtitle]: 他好像這個是可以讓你自己玩的. (15) [Subtitle]: 他可以讓你玩一個大富翁 所以你還有一個遊戲內容. (16) [Subtitle]: 裡面有身體乳 護手霜 各兩個 磨砂膏 沐浴露 沐浴鹽 超實用的 529元. (17) [Subtitle]: 聖誕老公公 好可愛喔. (18) [Subtitle]: 我覺得不用打開裡面 光是外面就可以看一整天. (19) [Subtitle]: 這個真的太值得買 又很漂亮 一個不用600元. (20) [Subtitle]: 而且告訴你們一個秘密 聖誕節過後一定特價. [Variety]: 一定特價. (21) [Subtitle]: 他是連內容物都那麼可愛 而他們的包裝就是最無敵的. [Logo]: Cath Kidston. [Variety]: BODY TREATS TIN.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, 1 male shopper in background, 1 female shopper in distance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white sweater and a black jumper dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store, characterized by high ceilings, industrial racking, and large quantities of boxed products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, high-arousal female voice speaks rapidly with an enthusiastic and welcoming tone. An upbeat electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat plays at a moderate volume in the background. (2) A faint metallic brushing sound occurs as the narrator handles a tin. The female voice continues with high pitch variability, emphasizing specific descriptive words about the product. (3) A brief, low-frequency male voice is heard responding in agreement, though the female speaker remains the primary acoustic focus. The background music remains constant in its energetic texture. (4) The female narrator maintains a fast speech rate, delivering information about pricing and set contents with clear articulation. The music concludes with a brief rhythmic tail as the voice track ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Detailed Product Demonstration -> Value Proposition -> Closing Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and gift guide for the Christmas season. By showcasing the aesthetic appeal of a Cath Kidston body care tin at Costco, the creator aims to convince viewers that this product is a high-value, attractive gift option under a specific budget.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on showcasing the features and pricing of a specific branded product and its availability at a specific retail chain.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high visual text density and fast-paced editing style are characteristic of social media commerce trends designed to grab and maintain attention quickly.
